data.title: scripts/worktree-cleanup.sh exceeds 6-level nesting SC (36 spaces at line 882)
data.description: worktree-cleanup.sh has shell nesting of 36 spaces (9 levels) at line 882, violating the no-shell-nesting->6-levels SC from epic 0df8-1c8c. Was listed in the original epic scope but not included in story de2f-e28d's AC checks. Apply guard-clause flattening and function extraction to flatten the nested if/case blocks.
